top_stories.title: OpenAI teams up with Infosys to bring AI tools to more businesses
top_stories.description: Infosys said the integration will be used to help its clients modernize software development, automate workflows, and deploy AI systems, initially focusing software engineering, legacy modernization, and DevOps.
top_stories.author: Jagmeet Singh
top_stories.content: Infosys said the integration will be used to help its clients modernize software development, automate workflows, and deploy AI systems, initially focusing software engineering, legacy modernization, and DevOps.

top_stories.title: China has erased the US lead in AI, Stanford HAI’s 2026 AI index reveals
top_stories.description: Stanford University researchers today released their highly anticipated 2026 AI Index Report, revealing a global landscape where artificial intelligence technology is being adopted at record-breaking pace, even as public trust in AI oversight and transparency hits new lows. The report by the Stanford Institute for Human-Centered Artificial Intelligence, known as Stanford HAI, is now into […] The post China has erased the US lead in AI, Stanford HAI’s 2026 AI index reveals appeared first on...

top_stories.title: Transform retail with AWS generative AI services
top_stories.description: Online retailers face a persistent challenge: shoppers struggle to determine the fit and look when ordering online, leading to increased returns and decreased purchase confidence. The cost? Lost revenue, operational overhead, and customer frustration. Meanwhile, consumers increasingly expect immersive, interactive shopping experiences that bridge the gap between online and in-store retail. Retailers implementing virtual try-on […]
top_stories.author: Bhavya Chugh
top_stories.content: Online retailers face a persistent challenge: shoppers struggle to determine the fit and look when ordering online, leading to increased returns and decreased purchase confidence. top_stories.title: AWS and Hopkins Engineering announce groundbreaking database for AI/ML antibody design
top_stories.description: Built in collaboration with the Gray Lab at Johns Hopkins Whiting School of Engineering, the Antibody Developability Benchmark is powered by one of the most diverse antibody datasets in public literature, enabling transparent performance evaluation for AI-guided antibody design.
top_stories.content: Built in collaboration with the Gray Lab at Johns Hopkins Whiting School of Engineering, the Antibody Developability Benchmark is powered by one of the most diverse antibody datasets in public literature, enabling transparent performance evaluation for AI-guided antibody design.

top_stories.title: Accelerate Generative AI Inference on Amazon SageMaker AI with G7e Instances
top_stories.description: Today, we are thrilled to announce the availability of G7e instances powered by NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs on Amazon SageMaker AI. You can provision nodes with 1, 2, 4, and 8 RTX PRO 6000 GPU instances, with each GPU providing 96 GB of GDDR7 memory. This launch provides the capability to use a single-node GPU, G7e.2xlarge instance to host powerful open source foundation models (FMs) like GPT-OSS-120B, Nemotron-3-Super-120B-A12B (NVFP4 variant), and Qwen3.5-35B-A3B,...
top_stories.author: Hazim Qudah
top_stories.content: Today, we are thrilled to announce the availability of G7e instances powered by NVIDIA RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell Server Edition GPUs on Amazon SageMaker AI.
